catlabPos.name: Catlab POS
catlabPos.problem: C&T Lab coffee shop chain required a centralized POS checkout system across multiple retail sites with order syncing and transaction analytics.
catlabPos.role: Full-stack Engineer: Architected PostgreSQL database model (15 tables), integrated receipt printing APIs, built real-time order cashier frontend.
catlabPos.challenges: Implementing robust offline support so checkouts function during internet drops, and auto-syncing local cached sales queues on connection restoration.
catlabPos.outcome: Deployed across 2 retail branches processing 200+ daily checkouts. 99.9% analytics sync uptime. Zero data loss incidents in 6 months of production.

lifestyleEcosystem.name: Lifestyle Ecosystem
lifestyleEcosystem.problem: Fragmented user productivity apps — users juggled separate habit trackers, financial planners, and daily agendas with no unified view.
lifestyleEcosystem.role: Sole Frontend Architect & UI Designer: Engineered central state machine using Zustand, built 12 customizable dashboard widget types.
lifestyleEcosystem.challenges: Optimizing canvas analytics rendering for 10K+ data points without DOM bloat. Syncing local stores across 5 data domains (habits, expenses, plans, trips, recipes).
lifestyleEcosystem.outcome: Bilingual (RU/EN) productivity platform with sub-100ms dashboard renders, responsive widget placement, and dynamic financial analytics with p50/p95 latency tracking.

stopCheck.name: Stop Check
stopCheck.problem: Automotive diagnostics business needed a multilingual lead generation landing page with automated form handling, replacing a legacy PHP backend.
stopCheck.role: Full-stack Developer: Migrated PHP backend to JavaScript serverless, implemented 3-language i18n (RU/UK/EN), integrated Resend email API.
stopCheck.challenges: Preserving original visual identity while modernizing the entire stack from React 17 + PHP to React 18 + Netlify Functions + Resend.
stopCheck.outcome: Serverless form handler reducing response time by 60% vs legacy PHP. Multilingual support expanded reach. Zero downtime since migration. 2/2 smoke tests passing.

repoRadar.name: RepoRadar
repoRadar.problem: Engineering teams using multiple git providers (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket) had no single dashboard to track activity across all platforms.
repoRadar.role: Creator & Lead Engineer: Designed provider adapter strategy pattern, OAuth PKCE authentication, AES-256-GCM token encryption, React 19 frontend with 13 lazy-loaded pages.
repoRadar.challenges: Building a cross-provider abstraction layer with 11-method interface that maps GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, and Azure DevOps APIs into canonical types. Implementing PostgreSQL-backed rate limiting replacing in-memory Maps.
repoRadar.outcome: 34 tests passing, 4 provider adapters (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Azure DevOps), Prometheus metrics, OpenAPI docs, Sentry error tracking, multi-user orgs with invite flow. Backup/restore scripts for production safety.

tgwrapper.name: TGWrapper
tgwrapper.problem: Teams building production Telegram bots needed a serverless-first framework with distributed CAS sessions, built-in observability, and rate limiting — none existed.
tgwrapper.role: Creator & Maintainer: Designed and built the entire framework from scratch — 0 external bot library dependencies, pure TypeScript.
tgwrapper.challenges: Implementing Compare-And-Set (CAS) session semantics via Redis Lua scripting for conflict-free concurrent access across distributed instances. Building APM-grade observability from scratch instead of wrapping OTEL SDK.
tgwrapper.outcome: 64 tests across 22 files, 7 npm packages published, automated CI/CD with changeset versioning, Telegram API drift detection via weekly watchdog. API stability policy documented. FailsafeSessionStorage for Redis resilience.

converter.name: FormatFlow Converter
converter.problem: Users needed a multi-format image conversion tool supporting SVG↔raster, vectorization, OCR, and PDF extraction across web and Telegram surfaces.
converter.role: Creator: Built ConverterCore (image processing), ConverterBot (Telegram), ConverterWeb (React SPA) — 3 packages in a monorepo.
converter.challenges: SVG sanitization against XSS vectors, implementing raster→SVG vectorization via potrace, PDF text extraction, and tesseract.js OCR in a coherent multi-surface architecture.
converter.outcome: 37 tests across Core + Bot, CSP headers with XSS protection, CI/CD with change-detection per package, self-hosted Tailscale deployment. Zero security incidents from SVG uploads.

wishlist.name: WishTracker
wishlist.problem: Social gift-giving lacked a unified platform where users could create wishlists, reserve items, track prices, and share with friends across web, mobile, and browser.
wishlist.role: Full-stack Engineer: NestJS backend with Prisma ORM, React 19 web SPA, Expo mobile app, Chrome extension — all sharing a unified API.
wishlist.challenges: Building a reservation system with real-time availability across surfaces. Implementing price scraping cron with history tracking. JWT auth with friend system across 3 platforms.
wishlist.outcome: Feature-complete social wishlist with auth, friend system, reservations, notifications, price tracking, and Swagger API docs. Docker Compose for local development.

speech.name: Speech Analyzer
speech.problem: Professionals lacked a tool to analyze filler word usage in their speech across multiple languages for improving public speaking skills.
speech.role: Creator & Developer: Built Telegram Mini App with Whisper STT integration, multi-language filler word detection (RU → UA/EN planned via dictionary abstraction), 0-100 scoring system, and session management.
speech.challenges: Implementing provider-pattern for STT backends (managed-whisper, faster-whisper) with abstract interface. Designing language-agnostic filler dictionary architecture so new languages can be added without changing detection logic. 3-dimensional scoring rubric (fillers-per-minute, speech rate, filler dominance).
speech.outcome: End-to-end filler word analysis pipeline with Whisper transcription, multi-language architecture (RU live, UA/EN dictionary stubs ready), 0-100 scoring, session history with detail/progress screens, and premium gating via session limits.

mypersfin.name: MyPersFin
mypersfin.problem: Personal finance tracking required multi-modal access (mobile, Telegram bot, API) with voice transcription and multi-currency support.
mypersfin.role: Creator & Developer: Built 3-surface architecture (Expo mobile, TGWrapper bot, Express API) with shared state via Redis and BullMQ job queues.
mypersfin.challenges: Cross-surface expense recording flow across mobile app and Telegram bot using shared Redis sessions. Voice transcription pipeline with Whisper via BullMQ. Telegram Stars premium gating.
mypersfin.outcome: Multi-platform finance app with voice transcription, Apple Wallet integration, Freedom24 integration, PM2 process management, and Sentry error tracking.

bouquet.name: Bouquet Constructor
bouquet.problem: Flower shops needed an interactive bouquet builder that let customers visualize arrangements before ordering online.
bouquet.role: Full-stack Developer: Next.js 15 app with Prisma ORM, Redis caching, PostgreSQL database — built interactive bouquet construction UI.
bouquet.challenges: Fragile canvas/render sync for bouquet visualization requiring careful state management. Implementing admin auth with scrypt + timingSafeEqual for security.
bouquet.outcome: 20 Vitest tests, Docker Compose local dev, GitHub Actions CI, security-hardened auth. Interactive bouquet builder with order management, user accounts, and delivery zones.

uiLibrary.name: UI Construction Library
uiLibrary.problem: Portfolio projects needed a consistent design system — atoms, primitives, behaviors, and tokens — that could be shared across multiple frameworks.
uiLibrary.role: Creator & Architect: Designed framework-agnostic component library with 14 packages + 8 apps in a pnpm + Turbo monorepo.
uiLibrary.challenges: Building framework-agnostic primitives that work across React, Solid, Svelte, and Vue while maintaining API consistency. Managing 4,792 files with dependency boundary enforcement.
uiLibrary.outcome: 74 npm scripts, axe-core accessibility testing, API snapshot contracts, bundle size budgets, dependency boundary enforcement, changeset-based versioning. All checks passing in CI.
